New Preprint on ArXiv about Modeling Relational Events with Measurement Errors

All that Glitters is not Gold: Modeling Relational Events with Measurement Errors

My paper All that Glitters is not Gold: Modeling Relational Events with Measurement Errors with Marius Mehrl, Paul W. Thurner and Göran Kauermann is now available on ArXiv.

Updated: October 04, 2021
